title: India Individual/HUF Income Tax Return (ITR-2, Assessment Year 2026-27)
description: Prepare and review an individual's or Hindu Undivided Family's (HUF's) Indian income tax return using ITR-2, for resident (including Resident but Not Ordinarily Resident, RNOR) and non-resident filers with no income from profits and gains of business or profession, for Assessment Year 2026-27 (Financial Year 2025-26). ITR-2 is the return used once a filer's facts exceed what ITR-1 (SAHAJ) or ITR-4 (SUGAM) can express: capital gains beyond the narrow section 112A allowance, more than two house properties, foreign assets or foreign-source income, being a director in a company or partner in a firm, holding unlisted equity shares, or being an RNOR/non-resident individual. Filing is online through the Income Tax Department's e-Filing portal (incometax.gov.in), which pre-fills known salary, TDS/TCS, and interest/dividend figures from Form 26AS and the Annual Information Statement (AIS) before the filer reviews, corrects, and completes the return — the same 'review a pre-filled return' shape already published for in/incometax/individual-tax-return-itr1-sahaj and in/incometax/individual-tax-return-itr4-sugam, whose general-information, salary, house-property, deduction, taxes-paid, bank-details, and verification sections this document reuses and extends. This document is the third of the ITR-1/2/4 set to be authored and models the notified ITR-2 form's own field set: general/identity information (including the filer-status, residential-status, director/partner/unlisted-shares/Portuguese-Civil-Code questions not present on ITR-1/ITR-4), the section 115BAC(6) new-tax-regime opt-out, seventh-proviso compliance questions, salary/pension income, up to two house properties in detail plus an aggregate figure for additional properties, other-sources income (extended with rental-of-machinery, section 56(2)(x), and lottery/online-game winnings not on ITR-1), Schedule CG capital gains at the asset-category/net-gain level (short-term and long-term, by rate bucket), Schedule VDA virtual digital asset (crypto) income, Schedule FA/TR foreign assets and foreign-tax-relief aggregates, Schedule AL assets-and-liabilities gating for total income exceeding Rs. 1 crore, the Chapter VI-A deduction schedule (including the two royalty deductions — 80QQB/80RRB), aggregate TDS/TCS/advance-tax figures, refund bank account details, and the verification block. Out of scope: business/professional-income schedules (Schedule BP, Manufacturing/Trading Account, Profit and Loss, Quantitative Details, depreciation schedules, GST turnover schedule) are not modelled because ITR-2 filers by the form's own definition have no income from business or profession — those filers use ITR-3/ITR-4 instead. Per-property, per-transaction, per-account, per-donee, and per-deductor breakdowns behind the House Property, Capital Gains, VDA, Foreign Assets, 80G/80E, and TDS1/TDS2/TCS schedules are also out of scope; see VERIFICATION.md. It does not submit the return, compute tax owed, or determine any refund/demand amount — the live e-Filing portal is always authoritative.

authority.name: Income Tax Department, Government of India (forms notified by the Central Board of Direct Taxes)

source.documentRef: ITR-2 notified-form Excel utility, Assessment Year 2026-27, version 1.1 (ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.zip / .xlsm), published on the e-Filing portal's own Downloads page at https://www.incometax.gov.in/iec/foportal/sites/default/files/2026-06/ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.zip

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema authored directly from the Income Tax Department's own current-cycle Excel utility (AY 2026-27), fetched with no access block from the e-filing portal's static file host (incometax.gov.in). The .xlsm utility (a ZIP/OOXML container) was extracted with Python's zipfile module and its worksheet XML parsed directly (no Excel/LibreOffice/pip install available in this environment) to read cell labels and codes across its 66 sheets. Every field's sourceRef cites the specific worksheet and cell (or row range, for multi-cell table headers) of that utility, plus the form's own line code (e.g. B1, 1a, A2ie) where one exists. See VERIFICATION.md for the extraction technique, scope decisions, and mock-data test run.

fields.name: filerStatus
fields.label: Status
fields.description: ITR-2 is used by individuals and Hindu Undivided Families (HUFs) with no income from business or profession — those filers use ITR-3/ITR-4 instead.
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'PART A - General' sheet cell E9 'Status (I-Individual,H-HUF)'

fields.name: residentialStatus
fields.label: Residential status
fields.description: Unlike ITR-1/ITR-4 (restricted to ordinarily-resident individuals), ITR-2 is also used by a Resident but Not Ordinarily Resident (RNOR) or Non-Resident filer.
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'PART A - General' sheet cell E39 'Conditions for Residential Status (Applicable for Individual only)'; residency dropdown

fields.name: panNumber
fields.label: Permanent Account Number (PAN)
fields.description: The filer's 10-character alphanumeric PAN, e.g. ABCDE1234F.
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'PART A - General' sheet cell AK7 'PAN'

fields.name: firstName
fields.label: First name
fields.description: Full name of the HUF where filerStatus is huf.
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'PART A - General' sheet cell E7 'First Name'

fields.label: Last name

fields.name: totalPeriodOfStayInIndiaCurrentYear
fields.label: Total period of stay in India during the previous year (in days)
fields.description: Used together with the 4-preceding-year figure to determine residential status for a citizen of India or Person of Indian Origin; relevant only when residentialStatus is not resident.
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'PART A - General' sheet cell AH46 'Total period of stay in India during the previous year (in days)'

fields.name: optsOutOfNewTaxRegime115BAC6
fields.label: Opting out of the new (default) tax regime under section 115BAC(6)?
fields.description: Default is No (i.e. the new concessional regime applies) unless the filer explicitly opts out to be taxed under the old regime.
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'PART A - General' sheet cell E49 'Do you wish to exercise the option u/s 115BAC(6) of Opting out of new tax regime? (default is “No”)'

fields.label: Filing under the seventh proviso to section 139(1) though otherwise not required to file a return?

fields.name: isDirectorInCompany
fields.label: Were you a Director in a company at any time during the previous year?
fields.description: A director-in-company disclosure is not present on ITR-1/ITR-4; a 'Yes' here (or heldUnlistedEquitySharesDuringYear, or isPartnerInFirm) is one of the conditions that requires ITR-2 instead of ITR-1.
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'PART A - General' sheet cell E76 'Whether you are Director in a company at any time during the previous year?'

fields.label: Were you a Partner in a Firm at any time during the previous year?

fields.name: heldUnlistedEquitySharesDuringYear
fields.label: Did you hold unlisted equity shares at any time during the previous year?
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'PART A - General' sheet cell E89 'Whether you have held unlisted equity shares at any time during the previous year?'

fields.name: governedByPortugueseCivilCode
fields.label: Are you governed by the Portuguese Civil Code as per section 5A?
fields.description: Applies to certain residents of Goa, Dadra & Nagar Haveli, and Daman & Diu; a 'Yes' requires Schedule 5A income-apportionment-between-spouses detail, which is out of scope for this document (see VERIFICATION.md).
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'PART A - General' sheet cell AF65 'Are you governed by Portuguese Civil Code as per section 5A? (If “YES” please fill Schedule 5A)'

fields.name: employerName
fields.label: Name of employer
fields.description: The primary employer; ITR-2 permits reporting more than one employer's salary in a repeated block, but this document models a single/primary employer as an aggregate — see VERIFICATION.md.

fields.label: Income from retirement benefit account maintained in a notified country (section 89A)

fields.label: Number of house properties to report
fields.description: ITR-2 permits more than the two-property cap that restricts ITR-1/ITR-4; this document models up to 2 properties in detail plus an aggregate figure for any additional properties — see VERIFICATION.md.

fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'House Property' sheet cell row 62 'Interest payable on borrowed capital' (property 1B, line 1h)

fields.name: additionalHousePropertiesAggregateIncome
fields.label: Aggregate income from house property 3 and beyond
fields.description: ITR-2's own House Property schedule repeats the same per-property block (address, co-owner/tenant detail, section 24(b) loan schedule) for every additional property with no fixed cap; a third-and-beyond per-property breakdown is out of scope for this document, see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'House Property' sheet cell row 75 'Income under the head “Income from house property” (ƣ1k + 2)' aggregation line, extended to properties beyond 1B

fields.name: interestFromSavingsBankAccount
fields.label: Interest from savings bank account
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'Sch OS' sheet cell G10 'From Savings Bank' (line 1bi)

fields.name: interestFromDeposits
fields.label: Interest from deposits (bank/post office/cooperative society)
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'Sch OS' sheet cell G11 'From Deposit (Bank/Post Office/Co-operative)' (line 1bii)

fields.name: incomeFromFamilyPension
fields.label: Income from family pension
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'Sch OS' sheet cell row 28 'Family Pension' (line 1e, Any other income)

fields.name: dividendIncome
fields.label: Dividend income
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'Sch OS' sheet cell J5 'Dividends, Gross (ai + aii + aiii)' (line 1a)

fields.name: rentalIncomeFromMachineryPlantBuildings
fields.label: Rental income from machinery, plants, buildings, etc. (gross)
fields.description: Not present on ITR-1/ITR-4's Other Sources schedule.
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'Sch OS' sheet cell I19 'Rental income from machinery, plants, buildings, etc., Gross' (line 1c)

fields.name: incomeUnderSection56_2_x
fields.label: Income chargeable under section 56(2)(x) (property/sums received without or for inadequate consideration)
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'Sch OS' sheet cell I20 'Income of the nature referred to in section 56(2)(x) which is chargeable to tax' (line 1d)

fields.name: winningsFromLotteriesEtc
fields.label: Winnings from lotteries, crossword puzzles, races, card games, etc. (section 115BB)
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'Sch OS' sheet cell row 43 'Winnings from lotteries, crossword puzzles races, card games etc. chargeable u/s 115BB' (line 2a(i))

fields.name: winningsFromOnlineGames
fields.label: Income by way of winnings from online games (section 115BBJ)
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'Sch OS' sheet cell row 45 'Gross Winnings from online games' (line 2a(ii))

fields.name: otherIncomeSourceDescription
fields.label: Other income (source description, if 'Any Other' selected)
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'Sch OS' sheet cell row 26 'Any other income (please specify nature)' (line 1e)

fields.name: otherIncomeSourceAmount
fields.label: Other income (amount)
fields.description: Populated only when a corresponding other-income description is supplied.
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'Sch OS' sheet cell J26 'Any other income' amount column (line 1e)

fields.name: hasCapitalGains
fields.label: Do you have capital gains to report?
fields.description: Capital gains reporting (other than the narrow section 112A allowance ITR-1 itself exposes) is one of the core reasons a filer needs ITR-2 instead of ITR-1/ITR-4.
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'Schedule CG' sheet cell row 3-4 'Schedule CG — Capital Gains' / 'A(I) Short-term Capital Gains (STCG)' section header

fields.name: stcgOnImmovableProperty
fields.label: Short-term capital gains on sale of land or building (net)
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'Schedule CG' sheet cell R19 line A1e, 'Short-term Capital Gains on Immovable property (1c - 1d)'

fields.name: stcgOnListedEquitySTT
fields.label: Short-term capital gains on listed equity shares / equity-oriented mutual fund units, STT paid (section 111A) (net)
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'Schedule CG' sheet cell R43 line A2ie, 'Short-term capital gain on equity share or equity oriented MF (STT paid)'

fields.name: stcgOnOtherAssets
fields.label: Short-term capital gains on assets other than immovable property or STT-paid listed equity (net)
fields.description: Covers item A5 of Schedule CG (e.g. debt mutual funds, unlisted shares, movable property); the schedule's own asset-by-asset consideration/cost breakdown is out of scope, see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'Schedule CG' sheet cell R94 line A5e, 'STCG on assets other than at A1 or A2 or A3 or A4 above'

fields.name: totalShortTermCapitalGains
fields.label: Total short-term capital gains
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'Part B - TI TTI' sheet cell I19 line 3a(v), 'Total Short term (ai+aii+aiii+aiv)'

fields.name: ltcgOnImmovableProperty
fields.label: Long-term capital gains on sale of land or building (net)
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'Schedule CG' sheet cell row 194 line B1g, 'Total Long-term Capital Gains on all Immovable properties'

fields.name: ltcg112AListedEquity
fields.label: Long-term capital gains on listed equity shares / equity-oriented mutual fund units exceeding Rs. 1.25 lakh (section 112A) (net)
fields.description: Section 112A allows an annual exemption of Rs. 1.25 lakh on such gains; this field is the taxable amount after that exemption. ITR-1/ITR-4 expose only this same narrow section 112A allowance as their sole capital-gains input line; ITR-2 additionally supports all other capital-asset categories below.
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'Schedule CG' sheet cell R256 line B3c, 'Long-term Capital Gains on sale of capital assets at B3 above (3a – 3b)'

fields.name: ltcgOnOtherAssetsWithIndexation
fields.label: Long-term capital gains on other assets, with indexation benefit (net)
fields.description: Covers unlisted shares, debentures, and other long-term capital assets not eligible for the without-indexation 12.5% regime; the schedule's own per-asset consideration/cost breakdown is out of scope, see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'Schedule CG' sheet cell R268 line B4c, 'LTCG on unlisted shares or listed debentures (4a – 4b)'

fields.name: totalLongTermCapitalGains
fields.label: Total long-term capital gains
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'Part B - TI TTI' sheet cell I25 line 3b(iii), 'Total Long term (bi+bii)'

fields.name: capitalGainsDeductionSection54Series
fields.label: Deduction claimed against capital gains under sections 54/54B/54D/54EC/54F/54G/54GA/54GB
fields.description: Aggregate reinvestment-linked capital-gains exemption claimed; the schedule's own per-section, per-asset claim detail (new asset acquired, deposit into the Capital Gains Accounts Scheme, etc.) is out of scope, see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'Schedule CG' sheet cell row 168/192/209/226/245 'Total Deduction under section 54/54B/54EC/54F' family of lines

fields.name: incomeFromVirtualDigitalAssets
fields.label: Income from transfer of Virtual Digital Assets (VDA) (section 115BBH)
fields.description: Crypto-assets/NFTs and similar virtual digital assets, taxed at a flat 30% rate under section 115BBH; reported on its own Schedule VDA, distinct from Schedule CG. The schedule's own per-transaction (acquisition date/transfer date/cost) breakdown is out of scope, see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'Schedule VDA' sheet cell I11 'Total (Sum of all Positive Incomes of Capital Gain in Col. 7)'

fields.name: totalCapitalGains
fields.label: Total capital gains
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'Part B - TI TTI' sheet cell K28 line 3e, 'Total Capital Gains (3c+3d)'

fields.name: hasForeignAssetsOrIncome
fields.label: Do you hold any foreign asset (including financial interest), or have foreign income, to report?
fields.description: Schedule FA is not applicable to a Non-Resident filer as per residential status, so this question is only asked (and required) for resident/RNOR filers. Foreign-asset/foreign-income reporting is one of the core reasons a filer needs ITR-2 instead of ITR-1/ITR-4.
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'TR_FA' sheet cell D20 'NOTE: This Schedule is not Applicable for NRI (Non Resident Indians) as per Residential Status'

fields.name: foreignDepositoryAccountsAggregateValue
fields.label: Aggregate peak balance of foreign depository accounts held during the calendar year
fields.description: Schedule FA table A1; the schedule's own per-account (country, institution, account number, peak balance, interest) breakdown is out of scope, see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'TR_FA' sheet cell row 21-22 Schedule FA table A1, 'Details of Foreign Depository Accounts held'

fields.name: foreignEquityAndDebtInterestAggregateValue
fields.label: Aggregate value of foreign equity/debt interests held during the calendar year
fields.description: Schedule FA tables covering foreign equity and debt interest holdings; per-entity breakdown is out of scope, see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'TR_FA' sheet cell Schedule FA tables covering foreign equity/debt interest, following table A1

fields.name: foreignSourceIncomeAggregateAmount
fields.label: Aggregate income from any source outside India
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'TR_FA' sheet cell Schedule FA 'Details of Foreign Assets and Income from any source outside India' — income column

fields.name: totalTaxReliefClaimedForeignTax
fields.label: Total tax relief claimed for taxes paid outside India (sections 90/90A/91)
fields.description: Schedule TR; the schedule's own per-country breakdown is out of scope, see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'TR_FA' sheet cell H11 Schedule TR line 1, 'Total tax relief available'

fields.name: totalIncomeExceedsOneCrore
fields.label: Does your total income for the year exceed Rs. 1 crore?
fields.description: Gates Schedule AL, which is applicable only where total income exceeds Rs. 1 crore.
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'AL' sheet cell E3 'Schedule AL — Assets and Liabilities at the end of the year ... (applicable in a case where total income exceeds 1 Crore)'

fields.name: immovableAssetsAggregateCost
fields.label: Aggregate cost of immovable assets held at the end of the year
fields.description: Schedule AL; the schedule's own per-asset (description, address) breakdown is out of scope, see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'AL' sheet cell O6 'Amount (cost) in Rs.' column, immovable-asset table

fields.label: Deduction u/s 80E (interest on education loan)

fields.label: Deduction u/s 80QQB (royalty income of authors of certain books)
fields.description: Allowed only if Form 10CCD is filed and the return is filed within the due date; not present on ITR-1 (present on ITR-4 SUGAM as well).
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'Schedule VI-A' sheet cell I56 line q

fields.name: totalTDSOnSalary
fields.label: Total tax deducted at source on salary (Schedule TDS1, as per Form 16)
fields.description: Aggregate TDS on salary across all employers during the year; the schedule's own employer-by-employer breakdown is out of scope, see VERIFICATION.md. Pre-filled from Form 26AS/AIS on the e-filing portal, and reviewed rather than manually entered.
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'TDS' sheet cell H14 'Details of Tax Deducted at Source from SALARY [As per FORM 16 issued by Employer(s)]', total row

fields.name: totalTDSOnOtherIncome
fields.label: Total tax deducted at source on income other than salary (Schedule TDS2)
fields.description: Aggregate TDS reported on Form 16A/Form 16B/16C/16E; the schedule's own deductor-by-deductor breakdown is out of scope, see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'TDS' sheet cell row 59 'Details of Tax Deducted at Source (TDS) on Income [As per FORM 16A issued or Form 16B/16C/16E]', total row

fields.name: totalTCS
fields.label: Total tax collected at source (Schedule TCS)
fields.description: The schedule's own collector-by-collector breakdown is out of scope, see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'TDS' sheet cell M74 Schedule TCS total row

fields.label: Total advance tax paid
fields.description: Challan-by-challan detail (BSR code, deposit date, challan serial number) is out of scope, see VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: hasIndianBankAccount
fields.label: Do you hold a bank account in India?

fields.label: IFSC code of the bank account for refund

fields.name: bankAccountNumber
fields.label: Bank account number for refund
fields.description: Must be 9 digits or more, as per the bank's core banking system.
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'Part B - TI TTI' sheet cell row 116/119 'Account Number'

fields.name: bankAccountType
fields.label: Bank account type

fields.name: verificationFullName
fields.label: Full name (in block letters) of the person verifying the return
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'Schedule Verification' sheet cell C4 'I, (full name in block letters)'

fields.name: verificationCapacity
fields.label: Capacity in which the return is verified
fields.description: E.g. self, karta (for an HUF), representative assessee.
fields.sourceRef: ITR-2 Excel utility, AY 2026-27 (incometax.gov.in e-Filing portal downloads, ITR2_AY_26-27_V1.1.xlsm), 'Schedule Verification' sheet cell C6 'I further declare that I am making returns in my capacity as'

fields.name: verificationPlace
fields.label: Place of verification

fields.name: verificationDate
fields.label: Date of verification
